     the Fermi energy is    -0.3204 ev

!    total energy              =  -10339.98813765 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          1.8E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.14938694 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -10339.83875071 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -220401.44492810 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  111230.23652561 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -4254.80671512 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  103088.15828950 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -1.98192260 Ry

     total magnetization       =    90.09 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =    96.29 Bohr mag/cell

     convergence has been achieved in  45 iterations
